svg.title: Phase 3 — AI Analysis technical diagram
svg.desc: Technical flow of analysis worker, vision model call, structured JSON output, confidence gating and routing

g.text: image URL · brand_profile · reference_asset URLs · output spec
Responses API · image + catalog refs + brand rules → Structured Outputs (JSON schema)
background · color · defects[] · framing · resolution · confidence
Fail → retry once → manual triage if still invalid
Model: GPT-5.5 (analysis) · GPT-5.4-mini (tagging) · Validation: Zod · Gateway: ai-gateway.ts (swappable)
